name: bilibili-electronic-pet
description: Repository-level validation scripts for the Bilibili Electronic Pet MVP.

scripts.test: npm run test:root-scripts && npm --prefix backend-ts test && npm --prefix frontend test && npm --prefix pet-companion-web test && npm --prefix douyin-sidecar test && npm --prefix qq-sidecar test
scripts.coverage: npm --prefix backend-ts run test:coverage && npm --prefix frontend run test:coverage && npm --prefix pet-companion-web run test:coverage && npm --prefix docs-site run test:coverage && npm --prefix douyin-sidecar run test:coverage && npm --prefix qq-sidecar run test:coverage
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend-ts run build && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix pet-companion-web run build && npm --prefix docs-site run build && npm --prefix douyin-sidecar run build && npm --prefix qq-sidecar run build
scripts.deploy:config: docker compose config && docker compose -f backend-ts/docker-compose.yml config
scripts.audit:high: npm audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix backend-ts audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix frontend audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix pet-companion-web audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix docs-site audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix douyin-sidecar audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix qq-sidecar audit --audit-level=high
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run test:ui && npm run staging:preflight && npm run deploy:config && npm run audit:high
